creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ben from comment #3)
> I've done up a patch to update the port to 0.6.0.

Hi Ben,
based on the words of the maintainer, how confident are you that your patch results in a functioning package?  He seemed to indicate that it needed a lot of system specific patches and I don't see any added by your contribution.

If you aren't confident, we should close the PR.
